title: WebviewWireframe
description: Schema of all properties of a WebviewWireframe.

slotId.description: Unique Id of the slot containing this webview.

isVisible.description: Whether this webview is visible or not.

permanentId.description: A globally unique and stable identifier for this UI element, computed as the hash of the element's path (32 lowercase hex characters). Used to correlate wireframes with RUM action events.
